/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm@17/bin/clang++ -O3 -march=native -ffast-math -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o -o main  matplotplusplus/source/matplot/libmatplot.a -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/lib/libjpeg.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libtiff.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libpng.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libpng.dylib -framework Accelerate -lm -ldl -framework Accelerate -lm -ldl matplotplusplus/source/3rd_party/libnodesoup.a /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
